sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99947" key="sunekla/mpw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνεκ-λάμπω</orth>, <sense id="n99947.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shine forth together</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.627c</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Longin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">44.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
